name: farmevidence
description: FarmEvidence Platform — Conservation Agriculture evidence collection & analysis

scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT,PYTHON -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm start --prefix client" "npm run python"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
